meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap using the Antigravity template and Claude Code. A high-speed, intermediate-level workflow for professional AI builders.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap kills momentum. Use the Antigravity project template to rapidly scaffold high-fidelity, production-ready SaaS demos. By leveraging Claude Code to automate the boilerplate and integrate complex logic, you can transform a single weekend of work into a polished, client-facing showcase that proves your technical authority instantly.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the silence of a non-existent portfolio deafening your ambition. Every potential client asks for proof, and you have nothing but raw talent and a hunger to ship. The industry doesn't care about your potential; it cares about the 'live' link in your bio. You are one project away from the big leagues, but the friction of starting from scratch is keeping you anchored to the ground.

Enter the Antigravity project template—a high-velocity framework designed to bypass the drudgery of setup. Combined with the surgical precision of Claude Code, you can now architect complex, feature-rich applications in the time it used to take to configure a database. It’s time to stop explaining what you can do and start showing them.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the base architecture to ensure your project is modular, scalable, and ready for rapid iteration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity boilerplate. Include authentication, a clean Tailwind CSS layout, and a Supabase integration layer.

steps.title: Define Domain-Specific Logic
steps.description: Inject the core business logic that solves a specific user problem to give your portfolio piece actual utility.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a backend service that processes user input, interacts with an AI API, and logs the result to the Supabase database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the core AI logic service based on the Antigravity schema'

steps.title: Component-Driven UI Expansion
steps.description: Build high-conversion UI elements using the Antigravity component library to ensure a professional look and feel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive dashboard component that displays the AI processing results in a card-based layout with real-time updates.

steps.title: Automated Testing and Validation
steps.description: Ensure your demo is bulletproof by integrating automated testing suites directly into your build process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of Playwright tests that verify the critical user journey: login, input submission, and result retrieval.

steps.title: Deployment and Portfolio Readiness
steps.description: Configure the CI/CD pipeline to push your project to a live environment, making it immediately accessible to clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Vercel deployment pipeline for this project, ensuring environment variables are correctly mapped.

pro_tips: Always deploy to a custom subdomain (e.g., demo.yourname.com) to increase brand authority.
Include a 'Technical Architecture' PDF in your repo to show clients how you think, not just what you code.
Use Claude Code to document your API endpoints in Swagger format automatically after every logic change.
Focus on one 'hero feature' rather than a bloated app; depth of functionality is more impressive than breadth.
Add a 'Reset Demo' button in your UI so clients can play with the app without needing to sign up every time.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, record a 60-second Loom video walkthrough of the app, post it on LinkedIn, and pin the live demo link to your Twitter profile.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for yourself and start building for your future clients. The tools are ready, the framework is set, and your portfolio is waiting to be filled. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
